subject: [PATCH v6 4/6] fuse: support registered buffer pools in io-uring

2026-07-16.patch_summary: This patch adds support for registered buffer pools in io-uring, allowing servers to use a buffer pool that is also registered through io-uring. This eliminates the overhead of pinning/unpinning user pages and translating virtual addresses per i/o request. The server can register a buffer pool by setting the FUSE_URING_REGISTERED_BUFPOOL flag when adding a bufpool through the FUSE_IO_URING_CMD_ADD_BUFPOOL cmd. The patch includes benchmark results showing improved write performance with registered buffers, bringing it closer to read performance.
